headline: Diversified Financial Services Stocks Q1 Teardown: PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) Vs The Rest
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the diversified financial services stocks, including PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) and its peers.
